name: Sama Agni (Balanced)
desc: Optimal digestive fire. Complete digestion, good immunity, clear mind. Promotes health and longevity.

name: Vishama Agni (Variable)
desc: Irregular digestive fire associated with Vata imbalance. Unpredictable digestion.

name: Tikshna Agni (Sharp)
desc: Overactive digestive fire associated with Pitta. Rapid metabolism but with inflammation.

name: Manda Agni (Slow)
desc: Sluggish digestive fire associated with Kapha. Slow metabolism and weight gain.
